name: calendar-plan-marketplace
description: Distribution marketplace for calendar-plan-skill — daily calendar planning via Google Calendar, Notion, Gmail, and a local Obsidian Calendar Context page.

plugins.name: calendar-plan
plugins.description: Build a practical daily plan from calendar commitments, a Notion task page, recent Gmail signals, and a local Calendar Context note. Two modes: /calendar-plan (draft first) and /calendar-plan auto (write safe blocks). Pairs with a launchd job for an evening cron.
